fields.name: tournament
fields.description: Find a tournament by its code.

fields.name: tournaments
fields.description: List tournaments with optional filters and sorting.

fields.name: game
fields.description: Find a game by its ID.

fields.name: games
fields.description: List games with optional filters and sorting.

fields.name: player

fields.name: players
fields.description: List players with optional filters and sorting.

fields.description: Search players by text (typo-tolerant) with optional filters and sorting.

args.name: search
args.description: Search term (matches last name, first name, country, club, PIN).

types.name: Tournament
types.description: A Go tournament registered in the EGD system.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Unique tournament identifier code.

fields.name: reliability
fields.description: Reliability score of the tournament data.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable tournament description/name.

fields.name: categoriesDescription
fields.description: Description of tournament categories.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date the tournament was held.

fields.name: city
fields.description: City where the tournament took place.

fields.name: nation
fields.description: 2-letter country code where the tournament was held.

fields.name: tournamentClass
fields.description: Tournament class (A, B, C, D).

fields.name: rounds
fields.description: Number of rounds played.

fields.name: totalPlayers
fields.description: Total number of players that participated.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status of the tournament.

fields.name: games
fields.description: Games played in this tournament.

fields.name: placements
fields.description: Player placements in this tournament.

fields.name: players
fields.description: Players who participated in this tournament (via placements).

types.name: String
types.description:
The `String` scalar type represents textual data, represented as UTF-8
character sequences. The String type is most often used by GraphQL to
represent free-form human-readable text.

types.name: Int
types.description:
The `Int` scalar type represents non-fractional signed whole numeric
values. Int can represent values between -(2^31) and 2^31 - 1.

types.name: GameFilterInput
types.description: Filter games.

inputFields.name: pinPlayer
inputFields.description: Filter games where either player has this PIN.

inputFields.name: dateFrom
inputFields.description: Filter games on or after this date.

inputFields.name: dateTo
inputFields.description: Filter games on or before this date.

types.name: GameOrderInput
types.description: Order games.

fields.name: data
fields.description: List of related items

fields.name: total
fields.description: Number of items in the relation

fields.name: data
fields.description: List of related items

fields.name: total
fields.description: Number of items in the relation

types.name: Float
types.description:
The `Float` scalar type represents signed double-precision fractional
values as specified by
[IEEE 754](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IEEE_floating_point).

types.name: TournamentFilterInput
types.description: Filter tournaments.

inputFields.name: tournamentClass
inputFields.description: Filter by tournament class (A, B, C, D).

inputFields.name: dateFrom
inputFields.description: Filter tournaments on or after this date.

inputFields.name: dateTo
inputFields.description: Filter tournaments on or before this date.

types.name: TournamentOrderInput
types.description: Order tournaments.

fields.name: data
fields.description: List of related items

fields.name: total
fields.description: Number of items in the relation

types.name: PlayerFilterInput
types.description: Filter players.

inputFields.name: ratingFrom
inputFields.description: Filter players with rating >= this value.

inputFields.name: ratingTo
inputFields.description: Filter players with rating <= this value.

types.name: PlayerOrderInput
types.description: Order players.

fields.description: List of related items

fields.name: total
fields.description: Number of items in the relation

types.name: Game
types.description: A game (individual match) played between two players in a tournament.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique game identifier.

fields.name: tournamentCode
fields.description: Code of the tournament this game belongs to.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date the game was played.

fields.name: round
fields.description: Round number within the tournament.

fields.name: pinPlayer1
fields.description: PIN of the first player.

fields.name: color1
fields.description: Color assigned to player 1 (b = black, w = white).

fields.name: pinPlayer2
fields.description: PIN of the second player.

fields.name: color2
fields.description: Color assigned to player 2 (b = black, w = white).

fields.name: handicap
fields.description: Handicap stones for this game.

fields.name: result
fields.description: Game result (1 = player 1 wins, 2 = player 2 wins, 0 = jigo, ? = unknown).

fields.name: sgfCode
fields.description: SGF game record code, if available.

fields.name: tournament
fields.description: The tournament this game was played in.

fields.name: player1
fields.description: Player 1 details.

fields.name: player2
fields.description: Player 2 details.

types.name: Player
types.description: A Go player registered in the European Go Database.

fields.name: pin
fields.description: Unique player identification number (PIN).

fields.name: agaId
fields.description: AGA (American Go Association) ID.

fields.name: lastName
fields.description: Player's last name.

fields.name: firstName
fields.description: Player's first name.

fields.name: countryCode
fields.description: 2-letter country code.

fields.name: club
fields.description: Club the player belongs to.

fields.name: grade
fields.description: Current grade (e.g. 1d, 5k).

fields.name: egfPlacement
fields.description: EGF placement ranking.

fields.name: rating
fields.description: Current GoR (Go Rating) value.

fields.name: deltaRating
fields.description: Delta GoR (rating change).

fields.name: proposedGrade
fields.description: Proposed grade based on rating calculations.

fields.name: totalTournaments
fields.description: Total number of rated tournaments played.

fields.name: lastAppearance
fields.description: Date of the player's last tournament appearance.

fields.name: gamesAsPlayer1
fields.description: Games where this player is player 1.

fields.name: gamesAsPlayer2
fields.description: Games where this player is player 2.

fields.name: placements
fields.description: Tournament placements for this player.

fields.name: tournaments
fields.description: Tournaments this player participated in (via placements).

fields.name: biography
fields.description: Biography if available.

types.name: Placement
types.description: A player's placement (participation record) in a tournament.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique placement identifier.

fields.name: pinPlayer
fields.description: PIN of the player.

fields.name: tournamentCode
fields.description: Code of the tournament.

fields.name: lastName
fields.description: Player's last name as registered for this tournament.

fields.name: firstName
fields.description: Player's first name as registered for this tournament.

fields.name: countryCode
fields.description: Country code at time of the tournament.

fields.name: club
fields.description: Club at time of the tournament.

fields.name: placement
fields.description: Final placement/rank in the tournament.

fields.name: gradeDeclared
fields.description: Grade declared at the time of registration.

fields.name: wonGames
fields.description: Number of games won.

fields.name: lostGames
fields.description: Number of games lost.

fields.name: jigoGames
fields.description: Number of drawn games (jigo).

fields.name: precedentRating
fields.description: Rating before this tournament.

fields.name: followingRating
fields.description: Rating after this tournament.

fields.name: player
fields.description: The player who participated.

fields.name: tournament
fields.description: The tournament this placement belongs to.

types.name: Biography
types.description: Biography text and photo for a player.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of biography content.

fields.name: biography
fields.description: Biography text.

fields.name: photo
fields.description: Photo identifier or URL.

types.name: PaginationInput
types.description: Pagination parameters.

types.name: __Schema
types.description: A GraphQL Schema defines the capabilities of a GraphQL server. It exposes all available types and directives on the server, as well as the entry points for query, mutation, and subscription operations.

fields.name: types
fields.description: A list of all types supported by this server.

fields.name: queryType
fields.description: The type that query operations will be rooted at.

fields.name: mutationType
fields.description: If this server supports mutation, the type that mutation operations will be rooted at.

fields.name: subscriptionType
fields.description: If this server support subscription, the type that subscription operations will be rooted at.

fields.name: directives
fields.description: A list of all directives supported by this server.

types.name: __Type
types.description:
The fundamental unit of any GraphQL Schema is the type. There are many kinds of types in GraphQL as represented by the `__TypeKind` enum.

Depending on the kind of a type, certain fields describe information about that type. Scalar types provide no information beyond a name and description, while Enum types provide their values. Object and Interface types provide the fields they describe. Abstract types, Union and Interface, provide the Object types possible at runtime. List and NonNull types compose other types.

types.name: __TypeKind
types.description: An enum describing what kind of type a given `__Type` is.

enumValues.name: SCALAR
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a scalar.

enumValues.name: OBJECT
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an object. `fields` and `interfaces` are valid fields.

enumValues.name: INTERFACE
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an interface. `fields`, `interfaces`, and `possibleTypes` are valid fields.

enumValues.name: UNION
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a union. `possibleTypes` is a valid field.

enumValues.name: ENUM
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an enum. `enumValues` is a valid field.

enumValues.name: INPUT_OBJECT
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an input object. `inputFields` is a valid field.

enumValues.name: LIST
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a list. `ofType` is a valid field.

enumValues.name: NON_NULL
enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a non-null. `ofType` is a valid field.

types.name: __Field
types.description: Object and Interface types are described by a list of Fields, each of which has a name, potentially a list of arguments, and a return type.

types.name: __InputValue
types.description: Arguments provided to Fields or Directives and the input fields of an InputObject are represented as Input Values which describe their type and optionally a default value.

fields.name: defaultValue
fields.description: A GraphQL-formatted string representing the default value for this input value.

types.name: __EnumValue
types.description: One possible value for a given Enum. Enum values are unique values, not a placeholder for a string or numeric value. However an Enum value is returned in a JSON response as a string.

types.name: __Directive
types.description:
A Directive provides a way to describe alternate runtime execution and type validation behavior in a GraphQL document.

In some cases, you need to provide options to alter GraphQL's execution behavior in ways field arguments will not suffice, such as conditionally including or skipping a field. Directives provide this by describing additional information to the executor.

types.name: __DirectiveLocation
types.description: A Directive can be adjacent to many parts of the GraphQL language, a __DirectiveLocation describes one such possible adjacencies.

enumValues.name: QUERY
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a query operation.

enumValues.name: MUTATION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a mutation operation.

enumValues.name: SUBSCRIPTION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a subscription operation.

enumValues.name: FIELD
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a field.

enumValues.name: FRAGMENT_DEFINITION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a fragment definition.

enumValues.name: FRAGMENT_SPREAD
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a fragment spread.

enumValues.name: INLINE_FRAGMENT
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an inline fragment.

enumValues.name: VARIABLE_DEFINITION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a variable definition.

enumValues.name: SCHEMA
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a schema definition.

enumValues.name: SCALAR
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a scalar definition.

enumValues.name: OBJECT
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an object type definition.

enumValues.name: FIELD_DEFINITION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a field definition.

enumValues.name: ARGUMENT_DEFINITION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an argument definition.

enumValues.name: INTERFACE
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an interface definition.

enumValues.name: UNION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to a union definition.

enumValues.name: ENUM
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an enum definition.

enumValues.name: ENUM_VALUE
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an enum value definition.

enumValues.name: INPUT_OBJECT
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an input object type definition.

enumValues.name: INPUT_FIELD_DEFINITION
enumValues.description: Location adjacent to an input object field definition.
